entities.name: Information Arrival
entities.context: When new information enters the system requiring routing decisions

entities.name: Information Retrieval
entities.context: When you need to locate previously stored information

entities.name: Information Change
entities.context: When existing information is updated across multiple locations

entities.name: Information Connection
entities.context: When relationships between information elements must be established

entities.name: Routing Decision
entities.context: The process of determining where incoming information should be stored

entities.name: Retrieval Memory
entities.context: Knowing the location of previously stored information

entities.name: Multi-Instance Synchronization
entities.context: Updating all places where information lives when changes occur

entities.name: Manual Linking
entities.context: The act of manually creating connections between information pieces

relationships.context: Arrival requires deciding where information goes
Changes require updating all information instances
Both address the maintenance of information relationships
